label: HasData
description: Access 25+ structured data APIs with a single key — Google SERP, Maps, Trends, News, Shopping, Flights & Hotels, Amazon, Airbnb, Booking.com, Zillow, Redfin, YouTube, Instagram, Indeed, Glassdoor, Yelp, Yellow Pages, Shopify, Bing, and general web scraping.

form.title: Connect HasData
form.subtitle: One API key unlocks 25+ data sources — Google SERP, Amazon, Airbnb, Zillow, YouTube, and more.

methods.label: API Key
methods.description: Paste your HasData API key. All 25+ APIs share the same key and credit balance.
methods.how_to:
## Get a HasData API Key

HasData offers a free trial with credits included — no credit card required to start.

### Steps

1. Go to [https://hasdata.com](https://hasdata.com) and click **Get Started** or **Sign Up**.
2. Create a free account with your email address.
3. After signing in, navigate to your **Dashboard** → **API Keys**.
4. Copy your API key.
5. Paste it into the **API Key** field below and click **Submit**.

### Available APIs (all use the same key)

- **Search**: Google SERP, Google AI Mode, Bing Search, Google Trends, Google News
- **Maps & Local**: Google Maps Search/Reviews/Photos/Posts, Yelp, Yellow Pages
- **E-commerce**: Amazon Products, Google Shopping, Google Immersive Products, Shopify
- **Travel**: Google Flights, Google Hotels, Airbnb, Booking.com
- **Jobs**: Indeed, Glassdoor
- **Real Estate**: Zillow, Redfin
- **Social & Video**: YouTube, Instagram Profiles
- **General**: Web Scraping API

### Pricing

APIs are billed per 1,000 requests. Rates vary by API ($0.07–$1.12/1k). Credits are shared across all APIs. See [https://hasdata.com/pricing](https://hasdata.com/pricing) for full details.

### Notes

- Keep your key private — it controls your full account balance.
- Each successful request deducts credits; failed/rate-limited requests are not charged.
- The base URL for all requests is `https://api.hasdata.com`.
